title: Human Hibachi 2
original_title: Human Hibachi 2: Feast in the Forest
overview: Set in the deep woods, a cannibal family obsessed with the first "Human Hibachi" video have have made it their life's mission to find the only two individuals left from it. If successful, they vow to provide them with the most elaborate feast imaginable.
